---
title: "The timing and precision of action prediction in the aging brain"
authors: "Diersch, N., Jones, A. L., & Cross, E."
year: 2016
date: 2016-01-01
pub-journal: "Human Brain Mapping"
volume: "37(1)"
pages: "54–66"
doi: "10.1002/hbm.23012"
pdf: "assets/papers/2016/diersch_etal_2016.pdf"
categories: [other]
---
